title: The Admiral's List: Remember Serroco! Edition
content:
{{Top|rwm|old}}
{{Otheruses|Serroco}}
'''The Admiral's List: Remember Serroco! Edition''' was the edition of ''[[The Admiral's List]]'' that was included with [[Knights of the Old Republic 16|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 16]].
